title: Liska Dan'kre
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Liska Dan'kre |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Black and tan |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|If she's hiring a skyhook for this party, she must be filthy rich.''"
"''Rich, yes, but you'll find nothing filthy about her.|Gavin Darklighter and Asyr Sei'lar|''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''}} '''Liska Dan'kre''' was a wealthy [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. ==Biography== Born to a wealthy Bothan family, Dan'kre attended school with [[Asyr Sei'lar]], whom she befriended. Sei'lar, something of a rebel, transferred out of that school to the [[Bothan Martial Academy|Bothan Military Academy]], but the two remained friends. After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] conquered [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Dan'kre moved to the world. Shortly after its conquest, she hosted a party on a luxurious [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]], to which Sei'lar was invited. She was delighted to reunite with Sei'lar, who was making a name for herself in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. She was also impressed by Sei'lar's boyfriend, [[Gavin Darklighter]]. The fact that Darklighter was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] excited mild disapproval among many of the guests, but Dan'kre easily accepted him. Dan'kre eagerly caught up with her old friend at the party, though a slight commotion was made when [[Karka Kre'fey]] challenged Darklighter to a duel after Darklighter honestly answered Kre'fey when asked if the Bothan's grandfather, [[Laryn Kre'fey]], had fouled up at the [[First Battle of Borleias]]. Darklighter declined. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Liska Dan'kre }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Dan'kre, Liska}} [[Category:Bothans]] [[Category:Coruscanti]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:New Republic individuals]]
